title: AIS Agentic Engineering Framework — Initialization Questionnaire State
description: JSON Schema 2020-12 for tracking the state of an interactive brownfield initialization questionnaire session. This file persists incremental progress so a session can be resumed after interruption.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI for this document.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this questionnaire session was started.

completed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when all questions were answered and the session closed. Null if still in progress.

repo.description: Path or GitHub owner/repo identifier for the repository being initialized.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of this questionnaire session.

answers.description: Map of question IDs to answer objects. Keys are string question IDs (e.g. 'q01_repo_name'). New answers are appended; never overwrite a recorded answer — create a new entry with a revision suffix instead.

derived_config.description: Partial aispec.config.yaml content built incrementally as answers are recorded. This is the working draft that becomes the final config on completion.

pending_questions.description: Ordered list of question IDs that have not yet been answered. Remove a question ID from this list when it is answered or skipped.

answer.description: A recorded answer to a single questionnaire question.

value.description: The answer value. Type varies by question — may be a string, boolean, integer, or array.

answered_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this answer was recorded.

skipped.description: True if the user skipped this question. A skipped question has a null value and will not contribute to derived_config.

note.description: Optional free-text note the user or agent attached to this answer.
